seo.title: Wplyw konwersji obrazow na szybkosc strony i SEO
seo.html:
Core Web Vitals to zestaw wskaznikow wydajnosci, ktore Google wykorzystuje przy ocenie stron. Jeden z nich — LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) — mierzy czas wyswietlenia najwiekszego widocznego elementu na ekranie.

Konwersja obrazow {S} na {T} zmniejsza rozmiar plikow graficznych, co bezposrednio skraca czas pobierania zasobow i poprawia wskaznik LCP. Mniejsze pliki oznaczaja szybsze ladowanie strony — szczegolnie istotne na urzadzeniach mobilnych. Dodatkowe techniki — loading="lazy" i fetchpriority="high" — przyspieszaja renderowanie.

Narzedzia takie jak PageSpeed Insights i Lighthouse wskazuja pliki do optymalizacji.

tips.i2d: Jesli oryginalny plik {S} byl juz mocno skompresowany, konwersja na {T} moze nie przyniesc duzych oszczednosci.
tips.trYesD: Format {T} obsluguje kanal alfa. Przezroczyste obszary pliku {S} zostana zachowane.
tips.trNoD: Format {T} nie obsluguje przezroczystosci. Przezroczyste obszary zostana zastapione bialym tlem. Rozwaz PNG lub WebP.
tips.i4d: Konwersja stratna jest nieodwracalna. Zachowaj kopie oryginalnych plikow {S} aby moc powtorzyc konwersje.

seo.title: How image conversion impacts page speed and SEO
seo.html:
Core Web Vitals is a set of performance metrics Google uses when evaluating websites. One of them — LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) — measures the time it takes for the largest visible element to appear on screen. On many pages, that element is an image.

Converting {S} images to {T} reduces graphic file sizes, which directly shortens resource download time and improves the LCP score. Smaller files mean faster page loading — especially important on mobile devices with slower connections. Additional techniques like loading="lazy" and fetchpriority="high" speed up rendering.

Tools like PageSpeed Insights and Lighthouse identify specific files worth optimizing.

tips.title: Tips for converting {S} to {T}
tips.desc: A few tips to help you avoid common issues during conversion:
tips.i1d: Converting images above 4000×4000 pixels may be slower and strain the browser. If processing many large files, consider splitting them into batches of 10–20.
tips.i2d: If the original {S} file was already heavily compressed, converting to {T} may not yield significant size savings. Try different quality settings.
tips.trYesD: The {T} format supports alpha channel (transparency). If the original {S} file contains transparent areas, they will be preserved.
tips.trNoD: The {T} format does not support transparency. Transparent areas will be replaced with a white background. Consider PNG or WebP for transparency.
tips.i4d: Lossy conversion is irreversible. Keep copies of original {S} files so you can re-convert with different settings if needed.

faq.q1: Is converting {S} to {T} safe for my files?
faq.a1: Yes. All conversion happens locally in your browser using the Canvas API. Files are never sent to any external server. When you close the page, data is automatically cleared.
faq.q2: Can I convert multiple {S} files at once?
faq.a2: Yes. The tool supports batch conversion with no file limit. Drag all files onto the converter or select them from your device.
faq.a3: The {T} format is widely supported by modern browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, and Opera.

savings.intro: I exoikonomisi exartatai apo ton typo archeiou kai ti sympiesi:
savings.fn: I pragmatiki exoikonomisi poikilei analoga me to periechomeno.

seo.title: Pos i metatropi eikonas epireazei tachitita kai SEO
seo.html:
Ta Core Web Vitals einai metrikes Google. To LCP metrai ton chrono eos to megalitero orato stoicheio.

I metatropi {S} se {T} meionei to megethos, syntomevei ti fortosi kai veltionei to LCP. Mikrotera archeia = griorteri fortosi se kinita. loading="lazy" kai fetchpriority="high" epitachynoun to rendering.

To PageSpeed Insights kai to Lighthouse vriskoyn archeia pros veltiosi.

tips.title: Symvoules gia metatropi {S} se {T}
tips.i1d: Eikones pano apo 4000×4000 px mporei na einai pio arges. Chorisete se omades ton 10–20.
tips.i2d: An to {S} itan idi sympiesmeno, i metatropi se {T} mporei na min exoikonomisi polla.
tips.trYesD: To {T} ypostirizei alfa kanali. Oi diafaneis perioches tou {S} diatirountai.
tips.trNoD: To {T} den ypostirizei diafaneia. Oi diafaneis perioches ginontai lefkes. Skeftite PNG i WebP.
tips.i4d: I metatropi me apoleies einai mi antistrepti. Kratiste antigrafa ton {S} archeion.

faq.a1: Nai. Ola ginontai topika ston browser meso Canvas API. Tipota den stelnetai se server.
faq.a2: Nai. Omadiki metatropi choris orio. Syrete ta archeia ston metatropea.
faq.a3: To {T} ypostirizetai apo Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge kai Opera.

el.sectionBasicExpansion:
To {S} einai ena eyrytera chrisimopoioumeno format archeiou me megali symvatotita. Analoga me ti chrisi, i metatropi se {T} mporei na prosferei simantika pleonektimata — mikrotera archeia, kaliteri poiotita i eyriteri ypostirixi platformon.

Aytos o dorean online metatropeas metatrepei ta archeia {S} se format {T} apeytheias ston browser. Kanena archeio den anevasei se server — oli i diadikasia ginetai topika sti syskevi sas.

Metatrepste osa archeia thelete choris imerisia oria, choris eggraphi kai choris ydrografimatam. Syrete ta archeia, prosamoste tin poiotita kai katevaste ta apotelesmata.

Convert as many images as you need — there is no limit. All files are processed sequentially, and results are available for individual or bulk download.
featureExpansions.Download files one by one or all at once: Download converted files individually by clicking the button next to each one, or download them all at once with a single click. Each file shows the size before and after conversion.
featureExpansions.Adjust quality to find the perfect balan: The quality slider lets you find the perfect balance between file size and image quality. For most use cases, 80–85% provides excellent quality with significant file size reduction.
